F3 Rule 14.1(1)(c)(i)(aa) inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 31(b)


F4 Words in rule 14.1(1)(c)(ii) substituted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 31(c)


F5 Rule 14.1(1A) inserted (6.4.2020) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2020 (S.I. 2020/135) , rules 1 , 19


F6 Words in rule 14.1(2) substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/843) , rules 1 , 31(d)


Marginal Citations


M1 Section 26 was amended by section 15(1) of and paragraphs 13 and 14(1) to (3) of Schedule 2 to the Children and Adoption Act 2006.


M2 1999 c. 18 Section 1 was inserted by section 120(1) of and paragraph 10 of Schedule 2 to the Adoption and Children (Scotland) Act 2007 ( 2007 asp 4 ).


M3 Section 5 was amended by section 115(2), (4)(a)(i),(ii),(4)(b) and (4)(c) of the Adoption and Children Act 2002.


M4 Section 14A was inserted by section 115 of the Adoption and Children Act 2002.


### [ F7 [ F8 Assignment of ] a serial number E+W


14.2. — (1) This rule applies where—


[ F9 (2) In a case under paragraph (1)(a), a serial number must be assigned to identify the person intending to adopt the child in connection with the proceedings in order for the person’s identity to be kept confidential in those proceedings.

metadata.title: Part 14 — Procedure for Applications in Adoption, Placement and Related Proceedings
